news.headline: Glencore's profit drops due to coal and cobalt decline, with GLEN stock affected.

Zendure released SolarFlow 800 microinverter in Düsseldorf, Germany on Feb 19, 2025. It's an 800W microinverter for energy storage and direct power output, offering bidirectional AC charging and high efficiency.
news.summary: In DÜSSELDORF, Germany, on February 19, 2025, Zendure, an EnergyTech company experiencing rapid growth, introduced the SolarFlow 800. This new product is an 800W microinverter designed for both energy storage and immediate power usage. The SolarFlow 800 is equipped with bidirectional AC charging and boasts top-tier efficiency levels. This innovative technology aims to enhance energy utilization and storage capabilities for consumers and businesses alike.

news.headline: Deloitte & Basware establish a Center of Excellence for digital finance & compliance, aiding CFOs in meeting regulatory deadlines.
news.summary: The growing pressure of impending regulatory deadlines is leading CFOs to prioritize compliance efforts. Recently, Deloitte and Basware announced an enhanced collaboration by establishing a dedicated Center of Excellence to assist businesses in fast-tracking their digital finance transformation. This strategic partnership aims to provide support for enterprises in adapting to evolving regulatory requirements and achieving financial compliance goals. The move reflects the increasing focus on integrating technology and expertise to navigate the changing regulatory landscape. Paris, dated February 19th, 2025.

news.headline: Frontier Scientific Solutions in NC benefits from Free Trade Zone amid tariff changes, crucial for life sciences supply chain.
news.summary: In Wilmington, North Carolina, on February 19, 2025, Frontier Scientific Solutions, a company specializing in temperature-controlled storage and transportation for the life sciences sector, is bracing for potential impacts from the Trump administration's proposed trade policies. The policies include new tariffs on pharmaceutical products and components. The company is preparing for potential changes in their operations as they navigate the uncertain landscape.

news.headline: VS-Immobilien GmbH & Co. KG chooses Yardi for digital transformation, marking a shift towards efficient asset management.
news.summary: A family-owned business located in Bielefeld is set to modernize its operations by implementing an end-to-end asset management platform in MAINZ, Germany. VS-Immobilien has chosen Yardi® as its real estate operational system. This move is aimed at streamlining processes and facilitating change management within the company. The decision aligns with their strategy to ready the business for future growth and development. The announcement was made on February 19, 2025.

Tetragon Financial Group Ltd to hold investor call on 5 March 2025 at 15:30 GMT to discuss annual report and company update.
news.summary: In London on February 19, 2025, Tetragon announced a upcoming investor conference call set for Wednesday, March 5, 2025, at 15:30 GMT / 10:30 EST. The purpose of the call is to review the annual report and offer a company update. Additionally, Tetragon's investment manager will be available during the call to respond to inquiries.

news.headline: French Foreign Minister Barrot: United States' Rubio wants a sustainable peace deal for Ukraine.
SEC considers Bitwise's XRP ETF filing among many; approval hinges on public input and compliance with investor protection standards.
news.summary: The approval of the Bitwise XRP ETF by the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) hinges on public feedback and adherence to the SEC's investor protection criteria. The decision will be based on the filing's alignment with regulatory standards and the response from the public. This signifies that the SEC is assessing the Bitwise XRP ETF for compliance with its regulations and considering input from stakeholders before reaching a decision.

news.headline: CZ donates $100,000 in BNB to LIBRA scam victims as student raises $108,000; CZ warns against quick money schemes.
news.summary: The founder of Binance, Changpeng Zhao, donated $100,000 worth of BNB tokens towards a fundraiser supporting victims of the LIBRA memecoin scam. Zhao, also known as CZ, contributed 150 BNB to a university student who had already given $50,000 to assist the victims. The student, a BNB investor, provided a wallet address to receive donations, with over $108,000 worth of BNB received so far. This act of generosity in the crypto world showcases the irony that while trying to make quick profits can result in losses, giving back can lead to greater returns.

news.headline: ALK's annual report for 2024 shows 15% sales growth and 65% rise in profits, marking best results ever. Company aims for continued growth in 2025.
news.summary: ALK's (ALKB:DC / OMX: ALK B / AKBLF) Board of Directors has recently given the green light to the 2024 annual report. The company saw significant success in Q4, leading to full-year results that met the most recent expectations and stand as the company's strongest performance yet. ALK is optimistic about maintaining its growth momentum and enhancing profits in the coming year.

news.headline: Viridien reveals 2024 full-year financial results on Feb 27, 2025 post-market close.
Sanofi and CD&R agree on Opella share purchase deal.
Aedifica NV/SA releases 2024 annual results for public regulated real estate company listed on Euronext Brussels & Amsterdam.
news.summary: Below is the latest update from Aedifica, a publicly traded real estate company based in Belgium and listed on Euronext Brussels and Euronext Amsterdam. The company has released its annual results for 2024. This information includes key financial figures for the year, such as revenue, profit, and any additional important metrics. For more detailed insights, investors and stakeholders are encouraged to review the complete report available on the company's official website.

news.headline: Ukraine's Zelenskiy: Minerals deal not fair without security guarantees.
Philips' order intake rebounds, as recall issues diminish.
Flex LNG stock traded ex-dividend of USD 0.75 per share on Feb. 19, 2025, listed on OSE & Euronext.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Hamilton, Bermuda, Flex LNG Ltd. (Ticker: FLNG) shares, traded on the Oslo Stock Exchange (OSE) and registered with Euronext Securities Oslo, will be trading ex-dividend at USD 0.75 per share. Shareholders as of this date will be eligible to receive the dividend payment.

news.headline: BoJ's Takata: We don''t have specific target, timing in mind for further rate hikes, which will be decided looking at corporate activity, economy and market moves.
Royal Philips announces new Supervisory Board appointments, Mr. David Pyott to retire, Mr. Bob White to join.
news.summary: Amsterdam, Netherlands – Philips, a leading health technology company, has announced changes to its Supervisory Board and Board of Management. Mr. David Pyott (British/American, 1953) will retire from the Supervisory Board at the end of the 2025 Annual General Meeting after serving three terms and chairing the Quality & Regulatory Committee since May 2020. The company plans to propose the appointment of Mr. Bob White (American, 1962) as a new Supervisory Board member at the same meeting. Mr. White is expected to succeed Mr. Pyott as the Chair of the Quality & Regulatory Committee. Philips is listed on NYSE as PHG and AEX as PHIA.

news.headline: Nyxoah launches Genio® therapy in Middle East; first patient implanted at Saudi German Hospital in Dubai, UAE.
news.summary: Nyxoah has introduced the Genio® breakthrough therapy in the Middle East, with the first patient receiving the Genio implant at the Saudi German Hospital in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. This marks the beginning of commercial availability for the therapy in the region.

news.headline: Canoga Perkins introduces private 5G transport solution for industrial automation. SyncMetra 100 units now shipping. MWC Barcelona, March 3-6.
news.summary: Canoga Perkins, a network connectivity solutions provider based in Chatsworth, California, has started distributing evaluation units for its SyncMetra 100 transport solution. This product is designed to streamline the setup, customization, supervision, and extension of low latency private 5G networks for industrial automation, which encompasses TSN, enterprise AI, and AR/VR applications. Alongside this, the company disclosed its participation at the Mobile World Congress in Barcelona from March 3 to March 6, where they will showcase their latest offerings.

news.headline: Japan's Hamada Syuzou launches "CHILL GREEN bitter & tropical" shochu, with pink grapefruit and galaxy hop; plans Asian market expansion by 2025.
news.summary: A new product has been launched by Hamada Syuzou Co., Ltd. in Ichikikushikino City, Kagoshima Prefecture, Japan. The product features a unique combination of pink grapefruit notes and rare Galaxy hop. The company is aiming to broaden its product's presence in the Asian market by 2025. This expansion plan is part of their strategy to increase market share and tap into the growing demand for innovative flavor profiles in the region. With the potential for significant growth, Hamada Syuzou Co., Ltd. is set to leverage this new product offering to capture market opportunities and strengthen its position in the industry.

news.headline: Philips sees growth, enhanced profitability, and robust cash flow in Q4 & 2024, amid solid execution of its three-year strategy.
TGS starts new multi-client 3D survey in Barents Sea's Goliat area, covering up to 1,600 sq.km. in August.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on February 19, 2025, TGS, a prominent provider of energy data and intelligence, has unveiled plans for a fresh multi-client 3D streamer acquisition and processing initiative in the Goliat region of the Norwegian Barents Sea. Covering approximately 1,600 sq.km., the new GeoStreamer survey will encompass recent discoveries like Countach, Elgol, and Lupa, enhancing TGS’ current data coverage in the Goliat region of the productive Hammerfest Basin. The Hammerfest Basin 3D project is set to commence in early August.

news.headline: Vopak posts robust FY 2024 earnings, raises dividend payout, and unveils fresh buyback plan, all in one go.
Marimekko's sales rose in Q4, and profit increased in full-year 2024 financial report.
news.summary: A recent report has unveiled that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.8%, the lowest level since the pandemic began. Approximately 431,000 jobs were added in February, surpassing economists' predictions. This positive trend is seen as a sign of the economy's recovery from the impact of the global health crisis. The leisure and hospitality sector showed the most significant growth, with 179,000 new jobs, followed by the professional and business services sector with 98,000 new jobs. The labor force participation rate also increased to 62.3%, indicating more people are actively seeking employment. Experts remain cautiously optimistic about the future job market outlook, amid ongoing uncertainties in the economy.

news.headline: EfTEN United Property Fund's NAV is 11.23 euros, increased by 1.5% in January, with 408K euros net profit (44K last year).
news.summary: In January, EfTEN United Property Fund recorded its first month with a fully invested property portfolio. The net asset value (NAV) per unit of the fund stood at 11.23 euros by the end of the month, showing a 1.5% increase from the previous period. The fund generated a net profit of 408 thousand euros in January, a significant rise from the 44 thousand euros earned at the same time last year.

news.headline: Wix surpasses Rule 40 in 2024, on track to achieve Rule 45 in 2025, showing strong growth and FCF generation.
news.summary: Concluding a year marked by ongoing acceleration in growth, the company has exceeded expectations in generating Free Cash Flow (FCF) in 2024. The company is on target to reach the Rule of 45 in 2025, after surpassing the Rule of 40 milestone. The sustained growth momentum indicates a promising trajectory for the company's financial performance, with strong numbers backing its progress.

news.headline: 2024 sees a groundbreaking performance setting the stage for the 2025-2028 strategic roadmap.
Impressive revenue and margin growth in 2024, achieving key milestones with substantial investments.
Ensurge Micropower ASA's Q4 2024 results show revenue growth of 15% year-over-year, with a net profit increase of 20%.
Fiverr (NYSE: FVRR) releases Q4 and FY 2024 results. Details in shareholder letter on investor website.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Fiverr International Ltd. (NYSE: FVRR) released its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year 2024. The company, known for revolutionizing collaboration worldwide, shared detailed operational insights and perspectives in its shareholder letter accessible on the investor relations site investors.fiverr.com. This update provides investors and stakeholders with critical data on the company's growth and earnings.

news.headline: Paul Chan Mo-po, Hong Kong's financial secretary, notes the market as 'open and vibrant' for crypto. He anticipates AI and blockchain integration to spur more use cases.
news.summary: Hong Kong's financial secretary, Paul Chan Mo-po, recently discussed the promising fusion of artificial intelligence and blockchain technology. According to him, this innovative intersection is expected to spur the creation of a multitude of new practical applications.

news.headline: Vopak announces EUR 100 million share buyback program for shareholders; to run till end of 2025, subject to approvals.
news.summary: Vopak, a company based in Rotterdam, Netherlands, has announced a share buyback program aimed at returning up to EUR 100 million to shareholders. The program will commence on 20th February 2025 and continue until the end of the year, pending any unforeseen circumstances. The shares bought will be cancelled subject to board and shareholder approvals. The buyback will be executed within the safe harbor regime and cannot exceed 10% of Vopak's issued capital. The company will provide weekly updates on the buyback progress and execute transactions through an independent intermediary. There is no agreement with existing shareholders regarding their involvement in the program, separate from any share transactions related to staff incentive programs. Vopak focuses on storage and infrastructure solutions worldwide for various essential products and is currently working on sustainable energy solutions. This initiative aims to enhance progress and sustainability in the energy sector. Vopak is listed on Euronext Amsterdam. Contact for further information: Liesbeth Lans (Press) - global.communication@vopak.com, Fatjona Topciu (Investors) - investor.relations@vopak.com.
